app.name: AllureTV
app.tagline: Romance stories you can listen, watch and read.

errors.title: Almost ready, except for playback
errors.subscriberOnly: This title is for subscribers only. Upgrade to watch.
errors.auth: We couldn't authorize playback. Try reloading the page.
errors.generic: We couldn't load this media. Check your connection and try again.

share.label: Share
share.title: {title} — AllureTV
share.text: I'm loving this on AllureTV — listen, watch and read.

comments.tapToRate: Tap a star to rate this story
comments.placeholderAnticipation: Tell the team what you think about "{title}"…
comments.ratingOptional: Star rating is optional — comment freely.
comments.emptyReview: Be the first to leave a review for this story.
comments.emptyAnticipation: Be the first to drop a note about this upcoming story.
comments.reviewsCount: {count, plural, =0 {no reviews} one {# review} other {# reviews}}
comments.signInBody: Join AllureTV — it's free and takes a minute. You'll be able to comment, rate stories, and save your favorites.

story.comingSoonDesc: This story is still in production. We'll notify you when the audiobook drops.

auth.checkInbox: Check your inbox for a sign-in link
auth.magicLinkSentTo: We sent a magic link to
auth.magicLinkInstructions: Click the link in the email to finish signing in. The link works for one hour. You can close this tab — opening the email on any device will sign you in there.

login.subtitle: Sign in to continue listening, reading, and reviewing.
login.disclaimerTerms: By continuing you agree to AllureTV's terms.
login.disclaimerEmail: We'll only email you about your account — never spam.

account.emptyMyListTip: Tap the + on any story to save it here.
account.emptyMyList: Your favorited stories will appear here.

subscription.upgradeMessage: Upgrade for full access to premium stories.
subscription.stripeRedirectMessage: You'll be redirected to Stripe to update your card, download invoices, or cancel.
subscription.manageWhenUpgraded: Manage your subscription here once you upgrade.
subscription.stripeNotConfigured: Stripe is not configured yet. Connect Stripe in admin settings.

reader.localeFallback: Not translated yet — showing the {locale} version.

install.safariSwitchDesc: Apple only allows PWA install through Safari (not Chrome/Firefox on iPhone).

subscribe.title: All access. One simple price.
subscribe.freeStories: Listen to our free stories anytime — no account needed.

paywall.requiredDesc: This story is for subscribers only. Activate your plan to watch, listen and read it.
paywall.upgradeBanner: To unlock this story, activate your subscription. We'll take you right back to it after.

myList.title: My List
myList.empty: You haven't saved any stories yet.
myList.emptyFilterDesc: Try another filter above or head back home to add more.
myList.emptyListDesc: Tap the + on any story to save it here. The ones with a PDF, you can download.
myList.previewEmpty: Tap the + on any story to save it here.

verifyAge.title: Confirm your age
verifyAge.subtitle: AllureTV is for adults only. Enter your date of birth to continue.
verifyAge.termsLabel: I am 18 or older and I accept the <terms>Terms of Use</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
verifyAge.errorUnder18: You must be 18 or older to use AllureTV.
verifyAge.errorRequired: Please fill in your full date of birth.
verifyAge.errorInvalidDob: That date does not look valid.
verifyAge.errorTerms: You need to accept the Terms and Privacy Policy.
verifyAge.errorNotAuth: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
verifyAge.errorUnknown: We couldn't verify your age right now. Try again.
verifyAge.disclaimer: Your date of birth is used only to verify that you are an adult. We do not share it with third parties.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyHint: We'll let you know when someone replies, likes your comment, or there's news from AllureTV.
notifications.signInRequired: Sign in to see your notifications.

messages.replyOfficial: AllureTV Team replied to your comment on {story}
messages.commentLikeMany: {actor} and {others} others liked your comment on {story}

banner.title: Your privacy, your call
banner.body: We use essential cookies to keep you signed in and remember your language. With your consent we also use PostHog to understand how visitors use the site so we can improve it.

modal.title: Cookie preferences
modal.intro: Choose which cookies you allow. You can change this at any time from the footer link.

essential.label: Strictly necessary
essential.desc: Required for sign-in, language, age gate and remembering your choice. The site does not work without these.

analytics.label: Analytics
analytics.desc: Anonymous pageviews and product events sent to PostHog. Helps us see which stories you love.

session.label: Session replay
session.desc: Records mouse, scroll and clicks (text inputs are masked) so we can debug confusing flows. Only enable if you're OK with this.

cookies.intro: This page lists every cookie AllureTV uses, what each one does, and how long it stays on your device.

whatAre.title: What are cookies?
whatAre.p1: Cookies are small files a website stores on your device so it can remember things between visits — that you are signed in, what language you chose, that you confirmed your age.
whatAre.p2: We split cookies into three categories. Strictly necessary cookies are always on because the site cannot work without them. Analytics and session replay only run after you click Accept.

rows.paywall_from: Returns you to the story after upgrading
rows.age_verified: Confirms you passed the adult content gate
rows.ph_session: Buffer for the session recording feature

managing.title: Managing your preferences
managing.body: You can change your choice at any time. Opting out clears PostHog cookies immediately and stops further capture.

cookies.contact: Questions about cookies? Email us at <contact>hello@alluretv.net</contact>. Back to the <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
